metadata.description: Open reduction and internal fixation of unstable ankle fracture patterns.
Malreduced ankle fracture with persistent mortise incongruity.
Radiographic widening suggesting deltoid incompetence and mortise instability.
Ankle fracture classification based on fibular fracture level relative to syndesmosis.
Degenerative joint disease after ankle fracture injury.
Fracture involving the ankle mortise and malleolar structures.
Composite mortise ring mental model connecting malleoli, syndesmosis, and deltoid.
Superficial peroneal nerve at risk in lateral ankle surgery.
Ankle joint congruity and stability of the mortise ring.
Transyndesmotic fibular fracture at syndesmosis level.
Operative fixation method for unstable ankle fractures.
Inadequate restoration of syndesmotic alignment after fixation.
Talar dome and talar body at the ankle joint.

claims.claimText: The ankle ring concept links malleoli, syndesmosis, and deltoid function — instability reflects ring disruption.
A deltoid ligament injury can make an isolated fibular fracture functionally unstable (bimalleolar equivalent).

metadata.claim_text: A deltoid ligament injury can make an isolated fibular fracture functionally unstable (bimalleolar equivalent).

claims.claimText: A deltoid injury can make an isolated fibula fracture unstable.

metadata.claim_text: A deltoid injury can make an isolated fibula fracture unstable.

claims.claimText: Assuming an isolated lateral malleolus fracture is always stable without assessing medial structures.

metadata.claim_text: Assuming an isolated lateral malleolus fracture is always stable without assessing medial structures.

claims.claimText: Medial clear space widening suggests deltoid incompetence and an unstable ankle fracture pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Medial clear space widening suggests deltoid incompetence and an unstable ankle fracture pattern.

claims.claimText: Ankle fracture management hinges on mortise congruity, skin status, neurovascular exam, and syndesmotic integrity.

metadata.claim_text: Ankle fracture management hinges on mortise congruity, skin status, neurovascular exam, and syndesmotic integrity.

claims.claimText: Stress views may help evaluate medial clear space and syndesmotic injury when plain films are equivocal.

metadata.claim_text: Stress views may help evaluate medial clear space and syndesmotic injury when plain films are equivocal.

claims.claimText: On rounds, state whether the mortise is stable, comment on syndesmotic injury, and outline splint and weight-bearing plan.

decisionPoints.trigger: Stable mortise with acceptable alignment after reduction
decisionPoints.action: Nonoperative immobilization with protected weight-bearing plan and repeat radiographs

decisionPoints.trigger: Unstable mortise pattern (e.g., medial clear space widening, bimalleolar injury, failed closed reduction)
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with operative fixation pathway (ORIF) including syndesmotic assessment/fixation when indicated
